name: testGetWaitEthernetPacketData
title: testGetWaitEthernetPacketData
description: If a valid Ethernet packet is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the packet's content can be called up with form 1.
Form 2 can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aPacket
parameters.description: An ethernetPacket variable that should be filled in with this function.
